title: Waddling Traders
description: Make Villagers and Wolves into Waddle Dees!
body:
![characters](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/735eb0c62ab889bc65d7a9d03ee333f586525d23.png)


```
Turn your Villagers, Iron Golems, and Wolves into characters from Kirby! This pack features custom animations, sounds, and new spears!
```
